creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
okay, cool.  That wasn't trivial work.

First, your diff is not big at all, please attach it so people can use the diff viewer.

Secondly, have you tested this in poudriere or can you?  specifically poudriere testport.  

If not, redports testing is the next best thing.

If not, at least output from "make check-plist" followed by "make stage-qa" output  (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html)

Also, please run "portlint" and paste the output in a comment here.
